title: myosotis palustris subsp. radicans
intro: Myosotis palustris subsp. radicans, also known as the swamp forget-me-not, is a subspecies of flowering plant in the borage family. This plant has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties. The health benefits of Myosotis palustris subsp. radicans include its potential to soothe skin irritations and reduce swelling, as well as its use as a treatment for wounds and respiratory issues. Herbal preparations of the plant can be made into teas, infusions, or tinctures, and it is often used in herbal remedies for its antiseptic and anti-inflammatory properties.
